creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Thanks for responding on that subject.

I regret, for that specific host it is impossible to me to provide logging informations (restricted area). I need to setup an external system with a similar setup (it is a NanoBSD environment, in which I do the package installation). 

Sorry for the delayed answer.

I use the same host now with an Apache 2.4 server an with the URI

url: "pkg+https://IP.ADDRESS.LOCAL/pkg/

with an alias setup to the repositories root dir. That works as expected.
